title: ranunculus prasinaster
intro: Ranunculus prasinaster, also known as the green buttercup, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus prasinaster include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
